name: ai-doc-intel-root
description: Root workspace runner for AI-Driven Document Intelligence System

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: node -e "const cp=require('child_process'); cp.spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], {cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true}); cp.spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], {cwd: './frontend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true});"
